evals.prompt: Log: squat 5×5 @ 225 RPE 8, bench 4×6 @ 165 RPE 7, barbell row 4×8 @ 135 RPE 7. 60 min total, sleep was great last night.
evals.expected_output: Creates wiki/fitness/sessions/2026-04-26-strength-upper-lower.md with session_type=strength, duration_min=60, three exercises with sets/reps/weight/RPE. Computes total volume per exercise and e1RM. Compares to wiki/fitness/exercises/{squat,bench-press,barbell-row}.md current PRs; if any beat existing pr_estimated_1rm, the exercise page is updated and pr-summary.md refreshed. sleep_quality inferred 4-5 from 'sleep was great'. ## Next Time prompted if not provided.

evals.prompt: Ran 5K in 28:30, easy zone-2 trail run, HR avg 142, felt strong.
evals.expected_output: Creates a cardio session file. Distance 5K, duration 28:30 (auto-derived pace 5:42/km), HR avg 142, focus 'easy zone-2 trail', mood inferred from 'felt strong'. If wiki/fitness/exercises/5k-run.md exists with prior best > 28:30, this is a PR — append to PR History, refresh pr-summary, and surface 'This beats your prior 5K best by X seconds — also log as accomplishment? (dimension: health)'.

evals.prompt: 30 min yoga, hips and thoracic, in flow. Easy day.
evals.expected_output: Creates a mobility session at wiki/fitness/sessions/2026-04-26-yoga-hips-thoracic.md with session_type=mobility, duration_min=30, focus areas listed, mood: flow inferred. No PR detection (mobility doesn't track PRs). Lightweight session log.
